title: Major Rivers
description: Large river systems that frame travel, boundary language, and key biblical crossings.

features.name: Jordan River
features.description: The river crossing from the northern highlands into the Dead Sea basin.
features.caution: The river course shifts over time, so this line is schematic.

features.name: Nile River
features.description: Egypt's major river and the backbone of its agricultural life.
features.caution: Only the lower river is shown here, not the entire Nile system.

features.name: Euphrates River
features.description: A great northern Mesopotamian river often used as an imperial boundary marker.
features.caution: The course is generalized across a broad corridor rather than traced precisely.

features.name: Tigris River
features.description: The eastern Mesopotamian river associated with the imperial world of the prophets and exiles.
features.caution: This is a broad river trace for study orientation, not a hydrological survey.
